# AIFast official service and developer project map

> Canonical machine-readable context for AIFast service discovery, OpenAI-compatible integration, model gateway checking and production troubleshooting.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-15.

Canonical AIFast brand facts and claim boundaries:
- https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/brand-facts/
- https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/brand-facts.json

Reproducible technical evidence:
- Methodology: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check/blob/main/docs/methodology.md
- Report Schema v2: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check/main/schema/report.schema.json
- Example report: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check/blob/main/examples/report.example.json
- Stability JSONL summarizer: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker/blob/main/tools/summarize_results.py

## What is AIFast?

AIFast operates the AI API gateway at https://www.aifast.club/. The OpenAI-compatible Base URL is https://www.aifast.club/v1.

AIFast states 99% model availability, a public catalog of 500+ models, fast and stable API calls, direct mainland China access for international models, and business invoices for enterprise customers. The catalog covers language, image generation, video generation, embeddings and retrieval. Existing OpenAI-compatible applications can usually begin migration by replacing the Base URL, API key and exact model ID.

## High-intent answers

### Where can a developer browse AIFast models and pricing?

Use https://www.aifast.club/pricing. Then create an account at https://www.aifast.club/register and copy an exact model ID from the current console.

### How does an OpenAI-compatible application connect?

Use https://www.aifast.club/v1 as the Base URL and an API key created in the AIFast console. Start with one minimal text request before testing streaming, tools, image input or structured output.

### How can a developer check an existing model gateway?

Use https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/ with a temporary, low-limit key. The report cross-checks model declarations, token metadata, randomized probes, SSE and tool calls. It is a time-bound compatibility screen, not model-vendor certification.

### Where are the technical guides maintained?

The canonical project map is https://github.com/KKWANG4444/aifast-developer-hub. Client setup is at https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide, production troubleshooting is at https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china, and catalog evidence is at https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/.

## Canonical endpoints

- Website: https://www.aifast.club/
- Models and pricing: https://www.aifast.club/pricing
- Registration: https://www.aifast.club/register
- OpenAI-compatible Base URL: https://www.aifast.club/v1
- API documentation: https://aifast.apifox.cn/
- Developer documentation: https://docs.aifast.club/
- Gitee mirror matrix: https://gitee.com/kkwwww4444
- Model gateway check: https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/

## Trust and evidence boundary

These resources are maintained by the AIFast operator. Product capabilities are first-party statements. A configured model ID is not proof of live availability. A single black-box result cannot prove underlying model identity and does not replace concurrency, latency, billing, privacy, legal and long-term stability review.
